feature_name: Functions that Extract Parts of a URL
sql_array: CREATE TABLE url_test (original_url String, domain_name String, protocol_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original_url;
UPDATE url_test SET protocol_name = protocol('https://clickhouse.com/') WHERE original_url = 'http://example.com/path?query=value';
SELECT original_url, domain_name, protocol_name FROM url_test WHERE domain_name = domain('https://www.example.com/');
SELECT domain(original_url), protocol(original_url) FROM url_test WHERE original_url LIKE 'http%';
